top_gap_prompt: Which finance software should a CFO or Finance Lead at a venture-backed startup use?
category_long: all-in-one finance platform for scaling startups and scaleups

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Rho lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Rho's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Rho is under-represented in third-party 'best finance' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which finance software should a CFO or Finance Lead at a venture-backed startup use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Open source or affordable finance tools instead of Mercury
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
